title: astragalus alvordensis
intro: Astragalus alvordensis, also known as Alvord milkvetch, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It is a perennial herb native to the Alvord Desert in eastern Oregon, and its roots have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus alvordensis include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and fatigue, and protect against oxidative damage. Astragalus alvordensis is often prepared as a tincture, capsule, or tea, and its root is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
